message.content:
D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict\backend 디렉토리에서 한글이 깨지거나 잘못된 인코딩이 있는 파일을 찾아 보고하라.

목표: 리뷰만 수행하고 수정하지 말 것. 문제가 있는 파일명, 라인 번호, 현재 내용, 예상 정상 내용을 목록으로 정리해서 반환할 것.

점검 항목:
1. Java 소스 파일 내 한글 주석·문자열이 `\uXXXX` 이스케이프나 깨진 문자로 표시되는 경우
2. application.yml / application-local.yml / application-prod.yml 내 한글 주석 인코딩
3. Spring Boot 응답 Content-Type에 `charset=UTF-8` 포함 여부 (SecurityConfig의 setCharacterEncoding 등)
4. ErrorCode enum의 한글 메시지 정상 여부
5. Gradle 빌드 설정(build.gradle)에 인코딩 옵션(`-encoding UTF-8`) 누락 여부
6. SQL 파일(db-ddl/*.sql) 내 한글 주석 인코딩

주요 점검 파일:
- backend/build.gradle
- backend/src/main/java/com/devwogns/trmdict/common/exception/ErrorCode.java
- backend/src/main/java/com/devwogns/trmdict/common/security/SecurityConfig.java
- backend/src/main/resources/application.yml
- backend/src/main/resources/application-local.yml
- backend/src/main/resources/db-ddl/ 하위 sql 파일들

Glob, Grep, Read 도구를 사용해 조사하라.

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

2	-- 운영자가 SQL Developer / tbsql 등으로 1회 수동 실행
3	--
4	-- 적용 정책: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-06-naming-standards-alignment-design.md 참조
5	-- (drop_legacy.sql 선행 실행 후 본 파일 적용)
6	
7	-- ========================
8	-- 1. 적용 이력 테이블 (모든 후속 SQL 파일이 자기 자신을 등록)
9	-- ========================
10	CREATE TABLE TB_TRM_SCHEMA_HISTORY (
11	    FILE_NM         VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL,
12	    APLCN_DT        TIMESTAMP(6)  DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
13	    APLCN_USER_ID   VARCHAR2(50)  DEFAULT USER NOT NULL,
14	    CONSTRAINT PK_TB_TRM_SCHEMA_HISTORY PRIMARY KEY (FILE_NM)
15	);
16	
17	COMMENT ON TABLE TB_TRM_SCHEMA_HISTORY IS '수동 SQL 적용 이력 (Flyway 미도입 컨벤션)';
18	
19	-- ========================
20	-- 2. TB_TRM_USER (design doc §5.2)
21	-- ========================
22	CREATE SEQUENCE TB_TRM_USER_SEQ
23	    START WITH 1
24	    INCREMENT BY 1
25	    NOCACHE
26	    NOCYCLE;
27	
28	CREATE TABLE TB_TRM_USER (
29	    USER_SN          NUMBER(19)        NOT NULL,
30	    LGN_ID           VARCHAR2(50)      NOT NULL,
31	    ENPSWD           VARCHAR2(100)     NOT NULL,
32	    USER_NM          VARCHAR2(50)      NOT NULL,
33	    EML_ADDR         VARCHAR2(100),
34	    ROLE_CD          VARCHAR2(20)      NOT NULL,
35	    USE_YN           CHAR(1)           DEFAULT 'Y' NOT NULL,
36	    RMRK_CN          VARCHAR2(500),
37	    RGTR_ID          VARCHAR2(50)      NOT NULL,
38	    REG_IP_ADDR      VARCHAR2(45),
39	    REG_DT           TIMESTAMP(6)      DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
40	    MDFR_ID          VARCHAR2(50),
41	    MDFCN_IP_ADDR    VARCHAR2(45),
42	    MDFCN_DT         TIMESTAMP(6),
43	    CONSTRAINT PK_TB_TRM_USER PRIMARY KEY (USER_SN),
44	    CONSTRAINT CK_TB_TRM_USER_ROLE_CD CHECK (ROLE_CD IN ('USER', 'ADMIN')),
45	    CONSTRAINT CK_TB_TRM_USER_USE_YN CHECK (USE_YN IN ('Y', 'N'))
46	);
47	
48	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UQ_TB_TRM_USER_LGN_ID ON TB_TRM_USER (LGN_ID);
49	
50	COMMENT ON TABLE TB_TRM_USER IS '시스템 사용자 (1차: USER/ADMIN 2단계 단일 ROLE_CD)';
51	COMMENT ON COLUMN TB_TRM_USER.LGN_ID IS '로그인 ID (영문/숫자/_) — 표준 용어 LGN_ID';
52	COMMENT ON COLUMN TB_TRM_USER.ENPSWD IS 'BCrypt 해시 ($2a$10$...) — 표준 단어 ENPSWD';
53	COMMENT ON COLUMN TB_TRM_USER.ROLE_CD IS 'USER | ADMIN';
54	COMMENT ON COLUMN TB_TRM_USER.USE_YN IS '활성 여부 Y/N (default Y)';
55	
56	-- ========================
57	-- 3. admin / user seed (로컬 한정 평문: Admin123!, User123!)
58	-- ========================
